Because of Winn-Dixie (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,647,042Details
International Box Office $861,443
Worldwide Box Office $33,508,485
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,208,431 (31.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:97.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,188 opening theaters/3,188 max. theaters, 4.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $57,603,436

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 18th, 2005 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 15th, 2005 (Wide), released as Because Of Winn-dixie (Australia)
Video Release: August 9th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements and brief mild language.
Running Time: 106 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, New Guy/Girl in School, Preacher, Single Parent
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walden Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
